instagram.note: Top 10 fastest-growing UK Instagram accounts Jan 2026 per HypeAuditor

awards.britAwards2024: RECORD 6 wins in one night: Album of the Year, Songwriter of the Year, Best New Artist, Artist of the Year, Song of the Year, R&B Act
awards.grammyNominations: 3x Grammy nominated (67th): Best New Artist, Songwriter of the Year, Best Engineered Album
awards.note: Most BRIT nominations AND most BRIT wins in a single year — EVER

tourData.venueTypes: Theaters + mid-size venues (2K-6K cap) for headline; stadium support slots Aug-Oct
tourData.supportSlots: Bruno Mars stadium tour support (MetLife, SoFi, Gillette, etc.) Aug-Oct 2026

brunoMarsSupport.venues: MetLife (4x), Lincoln Financial (2x), Gillette (2x), Lucas Oil, Raymond James (2x), Superdome, Hard Rock Miami (2x), Alamodome, Falcon Stadium (2x), SoFi (4x), Levis (2x)
brunoMarsSupport.estimatedExposure: 1M+ new fans see her live at stadiums
brunoMarsSupport.insight: Stadium support slot OVERLAPS with headline run. Fans who discover her at Bruno Mars will immediately search for headline tickets. Expect headline prices to SPIKE in Sep-Oct as stadium reviews drop.

referenceThresholds.description: If a NEW artist matches these metrics, they are likely to follow the Raye pricing pattern
keyIndicators: UK/international artist doing first major US headline run
European dates selling out or sold out
Self-funded tours (artist has financial pressure to price correctly)
Opening/support for a megastar (exposure to millions of new fans → headline demand spike)
Support slot → headline tour overlap = fans who see them at stadium want intimate headline show

pricingPattern.iconicVenues_premium: Ryman, Radio City, Bill Graham command 30-50% premium over comparable-cap rooms
pricingPattern.secondNight_premium: Night 2 at same venue often has higher price + lower inventory than Night 1
pricingPattern.sfPremium: San Francisco consistently highest price in any US routing

buySignals: UK/European dates selling out before US onsale
First US headline tour (pent-up demand from streaming fans who've never seen them live)
Spotify 20M+ but playing 2-5K rooms = extreme demand-to-supply mismatch
Opening for arena/stadium megastar while simultaneously doing headline theater run
Bruno Mars effect: stadium exposure (50K/night) funnels demand into 3-5K cap headline shows
brokerPlaybook.timing: Buy at presale or onsale for premium markets. Wait for price dips on weak markets only if discount is >30%.

watchFor: Added dates announcement (she's adding shows — SF sold out, will she add Night 2?)
Bruno Mars stadium support slot reviews → may drive headline ticket demand
BRIT Awards 2027 performance → booking cycle repeats
